task1.title: Map: Changes to a Town Centre (Present Day vs Proposed)
task1.prompt:
The map below shows the present-day layout of a town centre and a proposed plan for its redevelopment.

Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.

Write at least 150 words.

task2.title: Opinion: Printed Books/Newspapers vs Online in the Future
task2.prompt:
In the future, nobody will buy printed newspapers or books because they will be able to read everything they want online without paying.

To what extent do you agree or disagree with this statement?

Give reasons for your answer and include any relevant examples from your own knowledge or experience.

Write at least 250 words.
